title: VegAlts
description: VegAlts is a Spigot / (preferrably) Paper plugin that adds vegan paths for animal products, versions 1.13.2+.
body:
VegAlts is a Spigot / (preferrably) Paper plugin that adds vegan paths for animal products, versions 1.13.2+. These paths include: custom crafting recipes, custom fishing, custom archaeology, and more.

Command | Permission | Description:

    - /va help | vegalts.help | Links to guide.


Guide: https://github.com/lichenaut/VegAlts/blob/master/README.md

[![config.yml](https://github.com/lichenaut/VegAlts/blob/master/src/main/resources/config.yml)](https://github.com/lichenaut/VegAlts/blob/master/src/main/resources/config.yml)

Contact server :): https://discord.gg/txJDdYcRV6
